sections.description: TechZapp AI Writer helps you generate high-quality technology blog posts using AI. Supports OpenAI, Groq, and Google Gemini.
sections.changelog:
1.3.0 — 2026-06-28

  • Humanized AI Prompts to bypass AI checkers (high burstiness, active voice, removed AI clichés)
  • Enforced JSON Mode for Gemini, Groq, and OpenAI to prevent parse errors
  • Standardized OpenAI Chat Completions API format
  • Added cache busting to GitHub updates

1.2.0 — 2026-06-28

  • Enabled official JSON Mode API configuration for OpenAI, Groq, and Gemini to eliminate generation parsing errors
  • Added robust fallback JSON block extractor
  • Optimized article prompts with high burstiness, perplexity, active voice, and banned AI cliché terms to bypass AI detectors and sound human-written
  • Standardized OpenAI endpoint to Chat Completions

1.1.0 — 2026-06-28

  • Added multi-provider AI support: Groq and Google Gemini
  • Provider switcher in Settings with per-provider API key management
  • Fixed CSS loading in WordPress admin
  • Added GitHub-based automatic update system

1.0.0

  • Initial release
sections.installation:
1. Download the plugin zip from GitHub Releases
  2. Upload to WordPress via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
  3. Activate the plugin
  4. Go to TechZapp AI Writer → Settings and add your API key
